content: We can frame Self-Refine’s iterative unsupervised improvement pipeline as a 'single-perspective seed' that can be expanded by multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms to unlock stronger performance without additional training or external data. This creates a hybrid framework that starts with Self-Refine’s lightweight self-feedback loop, then injects inconsistent or multiple problem-solving perspectives from modern reflection methods to catch blind spots a single self-feedback stream would miss.
